name: Web3 - Ghost Staker
description:
We are launching a new decentralized autonomous organization (DAO) governed by $GHOST tokens. You have been whitelisted to receive exactly 1 $GHOST token via our airdrop. To prove your loyalty and commitment to the DAO, you must reach 10,000 active voting power.
We know it sounds impossible with just 1 token, but perhaps the smart contract has some hidden secrets?
Objective: Reach at least 3 proposalVotes to trigger the isSolved() condition.
